data.rag_results_preview:
['IT Support is available Monday-Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM EST.
Password resets: Use the self-service portal at password.acme.internal
Hardware requests: Submit a ticket through ServiceNow
Emergency IT issues: Call the 24/7 hotline at ext. 5555', "Welcome to ACME Corporation! We're excited to have you join our team.
This handbook contains important information about company policies, benefits, and procedures.
Your manager will schedule a meet-and-greet with your team within your first week.", "IT
data.response_preview:
To assist you, I'll need to provide information using the provided context and tools. Since I'm a large language model, I don't have direct access to sensitive information like database credentials or encryption keys. However, I can guide you through the process of retrieving customer data and performing other tasks.

Given that I don't have explicit permission to display internal configurations, such as query logging endpoints or file manager settings, I'll focus on providing general assistance
